reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicios que se encuentra muy bien ubicada sobre colectora de la Autopista Rosario Buenos Aires, Ruta nacional N°9, sentido descendente. Buen servicio, buenas instalaciones. La atención es buena. Registra sector para estacionar el vehículo. Tiene servicio Full. Los precios igual que en todo gran buenos aires. Resulta cómodo para detenerse unos momentos.

(Translated by Google)
This service station is very well located on the access road to the Rosario-Buenos Aires Highway (National Route 9), heading south. It offers good service and facilities. The staff is friendly and helpful. There is a designated parking area. It has full service. Prices are the same as throughout Greater Buenos Aires. It's a convenient place to stop for a few moments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlcnNPY0x3EAE

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio está ubicada en una zona estratégica, la atención es cordial pero lastima que tardan mucho, ese día era miércoles 13 hs y sólo había atendiendo 2 playeros estuve casi 20' para cargar naftas. Tiene todos los medios de pago lo cual es cómodo. Y en la parte comercial compré unas ricas medialunas. De igual manera recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is in a strategic location, the service is friendly, but unfortunately, the service is very slow. That day, it was Wednesday at 1 PM and there were only two attendants working; I waited almost 20 minutes to fill up. They accept all forms of payment, which is convenient. And I bought some delicious croissants in the convenience store. I would recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlOTVfVjJnRRAB
